CE1.justification: Acted directly without asking the user to recall or look up anything; surfaced missing items as findings rather than questions.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact prose but the closing 'Quickest path to Go' sentence stretches past what the call requires.

CE3.justification: Names the checklist artifact path inline and ties the No-go reasoning to specific MISSING items so the user can redirect cheaply.

CE4.justification: Checklist artifact is self-contained, but the daybook entry created with an open Handoff is an ambiguous in-progress artifact for a one-shot procedure run.
